articles.title: A Practical Framework for Testing Non-Deterministic AI Agents
articles.summary: Documented AI incidents rose to 362 in 2025 from 233 in 2024, while hallucination rates across 26 leading models ranged from 22% to 94%. These numbers show that the quality of AI Agents is becoming a serious bottleneck.

articles.title: Stateful AI without a database: threads and assistants
articles.summary: LLMs are stateless. Every API call to a raw model is a blank slate. The model has no idea what was said two messages ago. So the moment you want a chatbot that remembers the conversation, you are on the hook for state.
